caption:
I wanted fast internet without turning setup into a full-time job.

Public Wi-Fi kept buffering at the worst times, and I never felt fully private.
So I tried one simple switch: Freedom DNS.

One tap later, browsing felt faster, cleaner, and way less stressful.
Minimal setup, maximum peace of mind.

If you work from cafes, airports, or co-working spaces, this is worth trying.

#privacy #dns #mobileinternet #productivity #cyberhygiene
title: Freedom DNS - Bright Minimal Daytime
